title: ファミリーレストラン

text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian and I are getting dinner after a day
out, when...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You eating out too?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well, I just happened to be out for a bit.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
choice_data_list: Since we're all here, why don't we eat together?
Since we're all here, why don't we eat together?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, may as well. Do you mind if I join you,
Brian?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Sure, do whatever you want.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you can add soup to a meal. Hmm, what to
do...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Corn soup, egg drop soup...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'll have the hamburg steak combo. Extra rice.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...And the vegetable soup.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: That was tasty.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But I'm surprised! I never thought I'd see the day you ordered vegetable soup.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I just did it to shut up everyone who's been
nagging me. Including you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Geez. You know, people like you...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Never mind. Whatever the reason, I'm just glad
you've grown. Even if it's just a little.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I still have some shopping to do. If you'll
excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. See ya.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sorry to make you sit through that.
choice_data_list: I'm happy to see how much you've grown!
I'm happy to see how much you've grown!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Heh, don't you just look pleased as punch...
choice_data_list:
All that effort will definitely pay off in your
running!

All that effort will definitely pay off in your
running!
Let me know if you have any issues.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Heh, don't you just look pleased as punch...
choice_data_list:
All that effort will definitely pay off in your
running!

All that effort will definitely pay off in your
running!
Let me know if you have any issues.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's too much trouble. Forget it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Well, I'll leave it as an option. Satisfied?

Compared to when she gave no thought at all to
what she ate, I'm happy to see her making these
small changes.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Well, how have things changed so far? You tell
me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Because I can't see the changes when I'm running.

How has she changed since she's become more
food-conscious? I guess I'll need to keep a closer
eye on that from now on.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Since you mention it, there is something bothering me plenty.
choice_data_list: Whatever it is, please tell me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...It's gotten harder to openly eat fast food.

Since she seems to have become more conscious
of her diet, it may be a good idea to offer her
some fast food from time to time.
